subject: Charmeleon in aggressive combat stance, claws raised, flame-tail visible
description: Charmeleon lunges forward toward the viewer in a dynamic attacking pose, both clawed forelimbs raised and extended. The orange-scaled, cream-bellied fire lizard fills the foreground with its flame-tipped tail curving behind. The background is composed of angular geometric panels in teal and blue-green, contrasting sharply with the warm orange and red tones surrounding the figure. Lighting is warm and multi-directional, emphasizing the creature's muscular tension and aggression. The pose reads as mid-attack — all body and claw, no external weapons or props.
foreground: Charmeleon in attack stance, orange body, cream underbelly, claws extended
background: abstract angular geometric panels in teal and blue-green with orange accent
emotion: aggressive, predatory — weight forward, claws bared
